data.name: MaterialInventoryDuplicated
data.value: The inventory for this material already exists in the selected project.

data.name: MaterialNotFound
data.value: The specified material does not exist in the catalog.

data.name: UnexpectedServerError
data.value: Unexpected Server Error

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingMaterialInventory
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while attempting to create the material inventory.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorProcessingRequest
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: InvalidMaterialInventoryRequest
data.value: The provided material inventory data is invalid. Please check your inputs.

data.name: MaterialRequestNotFound
data.value: The material request was not found.

data.name: MaterialRequestAlreadyAccepted
data.value: Cannot update a material request that has been accepted.

data.name: MaterialRequestAlreadyRefused
data.value: Cannot update a material request that has been refused.

data.name: InvalidMaterialRequestRequest
data.value: The provided material request data is invalid. Please check your inputs.

data.name: InvalidMaterialRequestStatus
data.value: Invalid status value. Valid values are: Pending, Accepted, Refused.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingMaterialRequest
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while attempting to create the material request.

data.name: SupplierNotFound
data.value: The supplier was not found.

data.name: SupplierNotFoundByRuc
data.value: The supplier was not found for the given RUC.

data.name: InvalidSupplierRequest
data.value: The provided supplier data is invalid. Please check your inputs.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingSupplier
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while attempting to create the supplier.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingSupplier
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while attempting to update the supplier.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorDeletingSupplier
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while attempting to delete the supplier.

data.name: SupplierDuplicated
data.value: A supplier with the given RUC already exists.

data.name: SupplierDuplicatedRuc
data.value: The RUC already exists for another supplier.

data.name: InvalidMaterialCatalogRequest
data.value: The provided material catalog data is invalid. Please check your inputs.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingMaterialCatalog
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while attempting to create the material catalog.

data.name: MaterialCatalogNotFound
data.value: The material catalog was not found.

data.name: InvalidMaterialCategoryRequest
data.value: The provided material category data is invalid. Please check your inputs.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingMaterialCategory
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while attempting to create the material category.

data.name: MaterialCategoryNotFound
data.value: The material category was not found.

data.name: MaterialCategoryDuplicated
data.value: A material category with the given name already exists.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingMaterialCategory
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while attempting to update the material category.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorDeletingMaterialCategory
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while attempting to delete the material category.

data.name: MaterialCatalogDuplicated
data.value: A material catalog entry with the given name already exists.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingMaterialCatalog
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while attempting to update the material catalog.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorDeletingMaterialCatalog
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while attempting to delete the material catalog.

data.name: CategoryNotFound
data.value: The specified category was not found.

data.name: MaterialInventoryNotFound
data.value: The material inventory was not found.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingMaterialInventory
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while attempting to update the material inventory.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorDeletingMaterialInventory
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while attempting to delete the material inventory.

data.name: SupplierOfferDuplicated
data.value: A supplier offer for this supplier and material already exists.

data.name: SupplierOfferNotFound
data.value: The supplier offer was not found.

data.name: InvalidSupplierOfferRequest
data.value: The provided supplier offer data is invalid.

data.name: EmailAlreadyRegistered
data.value: Email is already registered.

data.name: InvalidRole
data.value: Invalid role. Valid roles are: Administrador, Gestor Operativo, Logística y Administración, Cliente, Ingeniero.

data.name: InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid email or password.

data.name: UserNotFound
data.value: User not found.

data.name: RoleRequired
data.value: At least one role must be provided.

data.name: UserNotFoundWithId
data.value: User with ID {0} not found.

data.name: ProjectNameAlreadyExists
data.value: A project with this name already exists.

data.name: ProjectNotFound
data.value: Project not found.

data.name: JustificationRequired
data.value: A justification is required for changing the project status.

data.name: InvalidProjectStatus
data.value: Invalid project status.

data.name: InvalidItemDates
data.value: The end date cannot be earlier than the start date.

data.name: ProjectNotFoundWithId
data.value: Project with ID {0} not found.

data.name: TeamUserNotFound
data.value: Team user not found.

data.name: TeamUserDuplicated
data.value: A team user with this email already exists in the project.

data.name: TeamUserNotCreated
data.value: The team user could not be created.

data.name: TeamUserNotActivated
data.value: The team user could not be activated.

data.name: TeamUserNotDeactivated
data.value: The team user could not be deactivated.

data.name: TeamWorkerNotFound
data.value: Team worker not found.

data.name: TeamWorkerNotCreated
data.value: The team worker could not be created.

data.name: TeamWorkerNotDeleted
data.value: The team worker could not be deleted.

data.name: MachineryAssignmentNotFound
data.value: The machinery assignment was not found.

data.name: InvalidMachineryAssignmentRequest
data.value: The provided machinery assignment data is invalid. Please check your inputs.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingMachineryAssignment
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the machinery assignment.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingMachineryAssignment
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the machinery assignment.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorDeletingMachineryAssignment
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while deleting the machinery assignment.

data.name: MachineryAssignmentFailed
data.value: An error occurred while assigning the machinery.

data.name: MachineryRemovalFailed
data.value: An error occurred while removing the machinery.

data.name: DocumentNotFound
data.value: Document not found.

data.name: DocumentNotCreated
data.value: The document could not be created.

data.name: DocumentSignFailed
data.value: An error occurred while signing the document.

data.name: UserNotDocumentParticipant
data.value: The user is not a participant of this document.
